history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, slightly messy hair is taking a selfie in a bathroom mirror. He is wearing a vibrant pink and purple Adidas soccer jersey with white stripes on the sleeves and a geometric pattern on the lower half. The jersey has a circular crest on the left chest with two stars above it. He's holding a teal smartphone up to take the picture, with his right hand visible. The background shows a marble-tiled wall and a white door with square paneling, slightly ajar, revealing a dark interior. The lighting is soft and natural, likely from the room's light fixtures, creating a casual and intimate mood. The color palette is dominated by the bright pink and purple of the jersey, contrasted with the neutral tones of the bathroom. The overall style is a candid, everyday moment captured with a smartphone.
